scripts.dev: npm run build -w @imageshow/shared && npm run dev -w @imageshow/server
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build -w @imageshow/shared && npm run build -w @imageshow/web && npm run build -w @imageshow/docs && npm run build -w @imageshow/server
scripts.check: npm run build -w @imageshow/shared && npm --workspaces run check
